evidence.claim: The system allows registration of a new patient with their symptoms.
evidence.fact: The system supports registering incoming patients with their presenting symptoms.

evidence.claim: Symptoms will be collected during registration.
evidence.fact: The system supports registering incoming patients with their presenting symptoms.

evidence.claim: The patient will be placed in a queue for medical attention.
evidence.fact: The system lets a physician take the patient at the head of the queue.
